rationale: Educ. Code §12.155 governs naming of college or university charter schools. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The name of a college or university charter school or junior college charter school must include the name of the public senior college or university or public junior college, as applicable, operating the school.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns charter school naming, unrelated to homestead exemption.
